name: ENFORX
description: 10-layer Causal Integrity Enforcement for secure AI trading. Runs any trade command through dual firewalls, intent formalization, multi-agent deliberation, deterministic policy enforcement, and Alpaca paper trading execution.

pythonPath.description: Path to the Python interpreter inside the ENFORX venv

enforxDir.description: Absolute path to the ENFORX project root

timeoutMs.description: Max milliseconds to wait for a pipeline run
